description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat, overhanging roof and a prominent wraparound porch on the ground level. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored panels, contrasting with darker railings and structural supports. Large windows are present on the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The porch is partially enclosed with railings and offers a sheltered outdoor space. The structure sits on a rectangular tiled base, suggesting a paved yard or patio area. The overall appearance is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout typical of contemporary urban bungalows.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a wraparound porch, light panel walls, and large front windows on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the full width of the wraparound porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch and the solid wall with minimal openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended roof and the back wall with limited fenestration.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the porch corner, two large windows, and the side wall.
